cards.duringText: If 2 or more clones are adjacent to the opposing fighter, ignore their card's value.
cards.title: Experience Outranks All

cards.duringText: The value of this card is +1 for each other friendly fighter in the opposing fighter's zone.
cards.title: Tactical Assault

cards.duringText: If a Clone in your fighter's zone has exactly 1 health, the value of this card is 6 instead. (It may be your fighter.)
cards.title: Same heart, same blood

cards.immediateText: The value of the opponent's card is equal to its printed value and cannot be changed.
cards.title: Watch those wrist rockets

cards.afterText: Choose a SCHEME card in your discard pile. You may put it on the top or bottom of your deck.
cards.title: Good soldiers Follow Orders

cards.duringText: If the opposing fighter is flanked, the value of this card is 5 instead.
cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: United Front

cards.afterText: Draw 1 card. If you lost the combat, summon a clone in any space.
cards.title: 501st Legion

cards.afterText: Move each of your fighters up to 2 spaces.
cards.duringText: The value of this card is equal to the amount of friendly fighters in your fighter's zone.
cards.title: Stronger Together

cards.basicText: Choose an opposing fighter. For each Clone in that fighter's zone, deal 1 damage.
cards.title: Execute order 66

cards.basicText: Move all Clones on the board up to 5 spaces. They may move through opposing fighters. Gain 1 action.
cards.title: Transport Carrier

cards.basicText:
Summon a Clone in any Space

ONGOING: If an effect would cause a friendly fighter to take non-combat damage. You may discard this card to ignore that effect.
cards.title: Elite Strategy

hero.name: Clone Troopers
hero.specialAbility:
BROTHERS IN ARMS
Start with 3 Clones on the board. After you attack, if you dealt 2 or more damage, summon a Clone in your fighter's zone. You may have up to 6 Clones on the board maximum.

ruleCards.content:
A maximum of 6 Clone Troopers can be on the board at any given time.

In order to be defeated, every Clone must be wiped off the board.
ruleCards.title: Clone Troopers
